Qualcomm AI Runtime (QAIRT) 2.47.0.260601

The arm64 and Hexagon v75 runtime libraries bundled by this application were
retrieved from Qualcomm's QAIRT Community SDK using the fetch script published
with Google LiteRT v2.1.6. Hexagon v75 is the runtime selected by Google's
official LiteRT package for Qualcomm SM8650 devices.

Source:
https://softwarecenter.qualcomm.com/api/download/software/sdks/Qualcomm_AI_Runtime_Community/All/2.47.0.260601/v2.47.0.260601.zip

The Qualcomm LiteRT dispatch library was retrieved from Google's official
litert_npu_runtime_libraries.zip release asset for LiteRT v2.1.6.

Source:
https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT/releases/tag/v2.1.6

See LICENSE.pdf and QNN_NOTICE.txt in this directory for license terms and
third-party notices.
